category_sources: Official repository README describes Hesiod as a name service library based on BIND/DNS.
source_facts.description says it is a simple string lookup service built on top of DNS.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use "Hesiod".
docs_sources: Official README includes build, install, configuration, and DNS data examples.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/achernya/hesiod; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes the Hesiod name service library and configuration via hesiod.conf and DNS records.
source_facts.description mentions DNS string lookup service and executable hesinfo.
